# SRC070 - 2025 B2B Buyer Behavior Report

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Section | Product Experiences |
| Authors / source | Consensus |
| Year | 2025 |

| Quality | Medium |
| URL | [https://goconsensus.com/research/2025-b2b-buyer-behavior-report](https://goconsensus.com/research/2025-b2b-buyer-behavior-report) |

## Bias / limitation

Vendor selling demo/product-experience software.

## Core takeaway

Interactive demos and product tours matter before a rep gets involved.

## How the marketing agent should use it

Use to add demo-led proof paths to every SaaS campaign.

## Tactics unlocked

- Convert source insight into a campaign hypothesis.
- Translate the hypothesis into one ad angle, one landing-page proof section, and one measurement plan.
- Record whether the tactic worked in `memory/tactic_performance.md`.

## Agent instruction

When this source is relevant, write one sentence explaining **why this source applies to the buyer state** before using it.

## Research extraction template

